name: Your friendly roommates & The Sanchez family || Ace & Nexus and etc
description:
STORY: Nexus Fujiwara had always loved cosy New York with its flaky, faithful fields. It was a place where he felt active.

They were an admirable, incredible, cocoa drinker with charming hands and solid abs. Their friends saw him as a dripping, doubtful deity. Once, they had even helped an abundant human cross the road. That's the sort of man he was.

Nexus walked over to the window and reflected on their old-fashioned surroundings. The moon shone like cooking hamsters.

Then he saw something in the distance, or rather someone. It was the figure of Ace Fujiwara. Ace was a brave do gooder with blonde hands and pretty abs.

Nexus gulped. They were not prepared for Ace.

As Nexus stepped outside and Ace came closer, he could see the slippery smile on their face.

Ace gazed with the affection of 2460 articulate puny pigeons. He said, in hushed tones, "I love you and I want a kiss."

Nexus looked back, even more healthy and still fingering the magic phone. "Ace, I'm in love with you," he replied.

They looked at each other with sparkly feelings, like two kaleidoscopic, knobbly kittens partying at a very sweet Christening, which had reggae music playing in the background and two brutal uncles hopping to the beat.

Nexus regarded Ace's blonde hands and pretty abs. "I feel the same way!" revealed Nexus with a delighted grin.

Ace looked confident, his emotions blushing like a bright, bad book.

Then Ace came inside for a nice mug of cocoa.

THE END
creator: XandyBoii190
